description: CompositionCotton blend round neck raglan t-shirt FittingComfort Wash CareHand wash or machine washThis vivid ink blue crew neck t-shirt from adidas suits men - young and old - alike. short sleeved, it's an ideal polo tee for Sports and fitness training at the neighborhood gym or sports club. Pair it with denims for that casual leisurewear look. It's a great add to the wardrobe of college-goers and working folks.
